female_female_dialogue_examples:
AMANDA WINSHIP: Your biscuits were wonderful this morning, Delilah.
DELILAH: Thank you.
AMANDA WINSHIP: Of course, they always are. I don't know how you do it.
DELILAH: Just cook em.
AMANDA WINSHIP: When I married Floyd I swear I couldn't even boil water. Migh

DELILAH: No thank you.
AMANDA WINSHIP: Of course you won't join me, you don't partake. That was thoughtless of me.
DELILAH: That's all right.
AMANDA WINSHIP: So you don't take spirits and- what else? In your church?

DELILAH: No thank you.

DELILAH: I'm sort of between churches right

evidence_snippets: racial discrimination is shown in the way Ty and Maceo discuss the treatment of black workers and the challenges they face.
racial tension is highlighted in the interactions between Ty and Maceo, particularly in Ty's comments about the treatment of black workers and the potential consequences of his plan.
